title: Monetary policy statements
summary: This source is a navigation/landing page for ECB monetary policy statements, not an actual policy statement itself. The page contains links and navigation menus to various ECB policy areas including strategy, tools, asset purchase programs, and press conferences. A reference to the latest press conference dated March 19, 2026 appears on the page, but no actual monetary policy decision or statement content is present.
key_points: This is a navigation/index page listing ECB monetary policy resources, not an actual policy statement
The page references March 19, 2026 as the date of the latest press conference
No specific policy decision, rate change, or forward guidance is contained in this source
The page includes links to ECB monetary policy tools, strategies, and transmission mechanisms
why_it_matters: This source cannot be used for market research or RAG purposes as it contains no actual monetary policy content. It is merely a portal to access ECB policy statements rather than a statement itself.
notes: Non-archivable: This is a listing page containing navigation links and site structure, not an actual monetary policy statement. The page references the latest press conference (March 19, 2026) but does not contain the statement text itself. To create a useful research record, the actual statement document from that date should be accessed directly rather than this index page.
